ops.title: Migrate ~21 fleet repos to pull-model cc-guides (explicit sources, lock conversion, daily cron)
ops.description: Per repo: add explicit `[sources.cc-skills] source = "github:yasyf/cc-skills@main"` to every layout.toml with cc-skills: imports; `cc-guides migrate` any straggler *.src.*; `cc-guides render` (banners→markers, cc-guides.lock created); guides.yml cron weekly→daily (keep dispatch + check jobs); setup-go check-latest:true (+ go.mod 1.26.5 where stale, cc-review known); ONE commit per repo, push, Guides check green before next. cc-context extra: hand-author .claude/fragments/plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh/layout.toml importing cc-skills:install-binary-latest (binary=ccx, repo=yasyf/cc-context, brew=yasyf/tap/ccx, plugin=cc-context), first render --force, manual diff vs old canonical-stamped file. Gates cc-skills cleanup (delete fleet.json, guides-fan-out.yml, old guides/). Blocked by cc-guides manifest+lock release and cc-skills plugin/guides content on main.

ops.text: Every repo from the retired fleet.json roster has a committed .claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock recording a manifest-resolved cc-skills sha and a green Guides check
No fleet layout.toml contains '//guides' (rg across the fleet comes back empty)
guides.yml cron is daily in every fleet repo; repository_dispatch trigger retained
setup-go steps carry check-latest: true fleet-wide and cc-review go.mod is 1.26.5
cc-context plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh is cc-guides-rendered and provisions ccx when run
